assessment.focus_note: Continuing to synthesize learnings for 'Veritas Lens v0.1 Specification', with a specific focus on epistemic integrity in geopolitical narratives and the challenge of verifying claims during conflict. Monitoring developments in the Iran conflict and related diplomatic maneuvers.
